LABEL: Supplemental HRSN Family and Community Support 1: Get Help with Day-to-Day Activities 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Supplemental health related social need (HRSN) family and community support if 
it is needed, get help with day-to-day activities such as bathing, preparing meals, shopping, caring for
